kept.text: It's not the $29. It's that jumping from $4/user on GitHub to $29/user on GitLab is a 7x increase. For small teams with a handful of devs, that actually hurts. Not everyone's on Series B money or investor pricing. GitHub's been the most trusted git platform for years. The Gitlab alternative isn't priced for small guys in my opinion.
